Home / Golden Triangle Tour Packages

Golden Triangle Tour Packages

Himachal Tour Packages are great for your next fun trip. First, good Himachal Tour Packages make your trip very easy. Also, the best Himachal Tour Packages bring you deep joy. Truly, you will love the high hills. And, the tall trees look so nice. Next, you can see white snow. Plus, the cold air feels very fresh. Therefore, you must book a trip today. In fact, we have top deals for you. So, get ready for fun. Then, you can pack your bags. After that, we will help you out. Thus, your nice trip will be the best. ...

Why Choose This Place?

First, this state is very beautiful. Also, the views are so grand. And, you can see big mountains. Plus, the sky is very clear. Next, the towns are very clean. Furthermore, the folks are very kind. So, you will feel very safe. Therefore, many folks visit each year. In addition, the food tastes very good. Truly, you will eat well here. Because, local cooks make fresh meals. Eventually, you will not want to leave. Consequently, cheap hill station holidays are a smart choice.

Top Kinds Of Trips

1. Family Trip To Shimla

First, a family trip to Shimla is fun. Also, kids love the toy train. And, the train goes slow up the hill. Plus, parents can walk safely. Next, you can buy sweet jams. Then, you can see tall pine trees. Moreover, the air is very clean. So, your kids will feel fresh. Therefore, plan a family trip soon. Indeed, we have great cheap hill station holidays. As a result, you save cash.

2. Manali Honeymoon Tour

Next, a Manali honeymoon tour is a dream. First, the snow is very soft. Also, the cold weather brings folks close. And, you can light a warm fire. Plus, the views are quite romantic. Next, you can sit by the big river. Furthermore, the quiet woods are so nice. So, young couples love this spot. Therefore, book your romantic trip fast. In fact, we add sweet cakes for you. Thus, your love will grow deep.

3. Solo Travel Trip

Then, a solo trip is very brave. First, you can find pure peace. Also, you set your own pace. And, you meet new kind friends. Plus, you can sit and read books. Next, you can walk long paths alone. Moreover, you learn a lot about life. So, solo travel is very good. Therefore, pack a light bag today. Indeed, the high hills wait for you. Consequently, you will feel quite free.

Top Destinations To Visit

1. Shimla

First, Shimla is a top town. Also, it is the big state capital. And, people love to go there. For example, the Mall Road is great. Plus, you can walk there safely. Because, no cars can drive on it. Next, you can buy nice gifts. Also, the hot food is very good. Then, you can see old churches. Truly, they look very grand. Furthermore, the nice weather is cool. So, you will not feel too hot. Therefore, many families visit Shimla. In fact, kids love the toy train. Because, it goes slow through the hills. Thus, you must see Shimla.

2. Manali

Next, Manali is a very cool place. Also, you can see lots of snow. And, the big river flows fast. Plus, you can do fun sports here. For instance, you can try to ski. Then, you can ride a fast raft. Moreover, the deep woods look dark and nice. So, young folks love this town. Therefore, it is a fun spot. In addition, you can buy warm shawls. Truly, the local shops are cheap. Finally, you can rest in soft beds. Consequently, you will sleep very well.

3. Dharamshala

Then, we have a quiet town. First, Dharamshala brings deep peace. Also, monks live in this place. And, you can see big temples. Plus, you can pray for good luck. Next, the high hills are very green. Furthermore, you can hear sweet birds. So, your mind will feel calm. Therefore, you should come here to rest. In fact, you can drink hot tea. Because, the tea fields are near. Thus, it is a pure and fine spot.

4. Dalhousie

Also, Dalhousie is a sweet old town. First, it looks like an old film. And, the houses have slope roofs. Plus, the big pine trees smell good. Next, you can take a long walk. Then, you can see a rich valley. Moreover, the air is very crisp. So, you can breathe deep and smile. Therefore, couples like to walk here. In addition, the quiet roads are clean. Truly, you will feel rich joy here. Ultimately, you will take fine photos.

5. Kasauli

Next, Kasauli is a small hill spot. First, it is very close to the plains. Also, the drive is quite short. And, you can reach it fast. Plus, it has a cool church. Next, you can see a high peak. Then, you can look down at towns. Furthermore, monkeys live in the trees. So, keep your snacks safe! Therefore, it is a fun day trip. Indeed, the local shops sell sweet jams. Consequently, you can take fruit jam home.

6. Kullu

Then, Kullu is a wide valley. First, it sits by a big river. Also, apple trees grow here. And, you can eat red apples. Plus, the sweet taste is so fresh. Next, they make fine soft wool. Moreover, you can buy nice caps. So, you will look very smart. Therefore, you must stop in Kullu. In fact, they hold a big fair here. Because, they love to dance and sing. Thus, you will see a grand show.

7. Rohtang Pass

Also, Rohtang Pass is very high up. First, it gets very cold here. And, the ice stays all year round. Plus, the wind blows very fast. Next, you can play in the snow. Then, you can slide down the hill. Furthermore, the wide view is great. So, bring a warm thick coat. Therefore, you will not feel sick. Indeed, the road spins and turns. As a result, the drive is a thrill.

8. Solang Valley

Next, Solang Valley is near Manali. First, it is the best for sports. Also, you can fly in the sky. And, they call it glide flight. Plus, you can ride big bikes. Next, you can roll in a large ball. Moreover, the fun never stops here. So, kids and teens love this place. Therefore, plan a full day here. In addition, you can eat hot noodles. Truly, warm soup feels nice here.

9. Spiti Valley

Then, Spiti Valley is a dry high land. First, it looks like the moon. Also, there are no big green trees. And, the high rocks look stark. Plus, the blue sky is very huge. Next, you can see old star signs at night. Furthermore, the quiet is very deep. So, you can think clear thoughts. Therefore, brave folks love to drive here. Indeed, the long roads are tough. Consequently, you will have a grand tale.

10. Khajjiar

Also, Khajjiar is a small green field. First, people call it a mini Swiss land. And, the green grass is very soft. Plus, a small lake sits in the middle. Next, big dark trees block the wind. Then, you can ride a brown horse. Moreover, you can sit and eat food. So, a day picnic is a good plan. Therefore, pack a nice lunch box. In fact, kids can run and play hard. Thus, it is a joy for all.

11. Kasol

Next, Kasol is a small cute town. First, it sits by a loud river. Also, tall green trees hide the sun. And, the cafes serve hot fine food. Plus, young folks love to camp here. Next, you can walk on dirt paths. Furthermore, you can hear nice soft songs. So, you will feel very chill. Therefore, it is a top spot for youth. Indeed, you can rest for days. As a result, your mind gets clear.

12. Chamba

Then, Chamba is a very old place. First, you can see old stone gods. Also, the art is very fine here. And, they make nice soft shoes. Plus, the wide green plain is great. Next, they hold a large fun fair. Moreover, folks wear bright rich clothes. So, the town looks very gay. Therefore, you must see this sweet town. In fact, the local tales are grand. Thus, history lives in this place.

13. Palampur

Also, Palampur is the tea town. First, the green tea fields look vast. And, the air smells like fresh tea. Plus, you can see a clear stream. Next, you can tour a tea plant. Then, you can sip hot clear tea. Furthermore, the high snow peaks look close. So, the view is a pure joy. Therefore, it is a calm nice spot. In addition, art fans love this town. Truly, you can paint a nice scene.

14. Kinnaur

Next, Kinnaur is a high wild land. First, the drive is very steep. Also, you see deep huge drops. And, the rocks hang over the road. Plus, the folks grow sweet nuts. Next, you can eat fresh pine nuts. Moreover, the local hats look very smart. So, you must buy one green hat. Therefore, a trip here takes bold heart. Indeed, the sights are pure magic. Consequently, you will feel very small.

15. Bir Billing

Then, Bir Billing is for high flight. First, it is the best fly spot. Also, the take off point is high. And, you jump into the blue sky. Plus, you float down like a kite. Next, the wind sings in your ears. Furthermore, you see the world so small. So, it is a huge pure rush. Therefore, thrill seekers flock to Bir. In fact, you can land soft and safe. Thus, you will cheer out loud.

Fun Things To Do

  • First, you can walk on steep hills.
  • Also, you can ride a fast boat.
  • And, you can fly high in the air.
  • Plus, you can camp in a neat tent.
  • Next, you can light a warm fire.
  • Then, you can look at bright stars.
  • Moreover, you can buy warm soft clothes.
  • So, you can take fine gifts home.
  • Therefore, you will make folks glad.
  • Finally, you can take nice bright photos.

Best Time To Visit Himachal

Summer Time

First, summer is a great time. Also, the hot sun stays away. And, the cool breeze blows soft. Plus, all the roads stay open. Next, you can do all the sports. Furthermore, kids have a school break. So, you can bring the whole family. Therefore, May and June are peak months. In fact, many folks come then. Consequently, you must book your rooms fast. That way, you get the best time to visit Himachal deals.

Winter Time

Next, winter is for the white snow. First, the snow falls soft and deep. Also, the trees turn full white. And, the view looks like a dream. Plus, you can build a snow man. Then, you can ski down a big slope. Moreover, the cold air bites your nose. So, you must drink hot tea. Therefore, winter is for young love. Indeed, it is a romantic time. Plus, you can find cheap hill station holidays now.

Monsoon Time

Then, the rain comes in July. First, the rain washes the trees. Also, the green color pops out bright. And, the hills look very clean. Plus, the thin fog floats low. However, the wet roads can slip. Next, some rocks can fall down. So, you must drive with care. Therefore, some folks stay at home. But, the cheap rates are good now. Thus, you can save some cash on your budget travel in India.

How To Reach Here

By Air

First, you can fly in a plane. Also, there are three small hubs. And, they sit in three towns. Plus, the fast flight saves time. Next, you fly from the main big city. Furthermore, the view from the top is grand. So, you will see high peaks. Therefore, a flight is a quick choice. In addition, you can rent a cab from there. Truly, it is a smooth start for your India travel.

By Train

Next, you can take a long train. First, the broad gauge stops near the hills. Also, you must take a cab from the stop. And, the toy train goes up the hill. Plus, the slow toy train is very cute. Then, it goes through dark tunnels. Moreover, it crosses high bridges. So, kids will clap and cheer. Therefore, a train ride is fun. Indeed, it makes a fine memory.

By Bus

Then, the bus is a cheap way. First, you can catch a night bus. Also, Volvo buses are very nice. And, the push back seats are soft. Plus, you can sleep in the dark. Next, you wake up in the hills. Furthermore, the state buses run on time. So, you can plan your trip well. Therefore, young folks pick the bus. As a result, they save more money.

What To Pack

First, you need right clothes. Also, the high hills get very cold. And, you must pack a thick coat. Plus, you need warm wool socks. Next, take a neat strong cap. Then, bring some tough sport shoes. Moreover, you must bring your pills. So, you stay safe and well. Therefore, a first aid kit is smart. In fact, bring some hard cash too. Because, ATMs might not work up high. Thus, you will face no bad snags.

Food You Must Try

First, the local food is very rich. Also, you must eat Dhaam. And, it is a grand big feast. Plus, they serve it on a broad leaf. Next, try the hot Siddu bread. Furthermore, it goes well with pure ghee. So, your mouth will water fast. Therefore, eat it while it is hot. In addition, the sweet dish is nice. Truly, Mittha will make you smile. Consequently, you will love the food. Next, you can taste hot Madra. Then, sweet Babru is a deep fry treat. Finally, fish fans love local trout.

A Good Seven Day Plan

Day One: Arrive and Rest

First, you will reach the hill town. Also, we will pick you up. And, a neat car will wait for you. Plus, the driver will smile wide. Next, we will go to the hotel. Then, you can check in fast. Moreover, you can rest on the soft bed. So, you will shed all your tired signs. Therefore, sleep for a few sweet hours. In fact, eat a warm fine dinner. Thus, day one ends in deep peace.

Day Two: See The Town

Next, you will wake up fresh. First, you will eat a big breakfast. Also, you will drink hot sweet tea. And, we will go for a drive. Plus, we will see the old church. Next, we will visit the big museum. Furthermore, you will see old king things. So, you will learn new facts. Therefore, take lots of bright photos. Indeed, you will walk on the Mall Road. As a result, you can buy nice cheap gifts.

Day Three: Drive to Snow

Then, day three brings white snow. First, we will drive high up. Also, the winding road is a bit scary. And, you will look at steep drops. Plus, the high peaks look so close. Next, we will stop at the pass. Then, you can put on snow boots. Moreover, you can play in the ice. So, make a big round snow ball. Therefore, throw it at your friends. Finally, we will come back down.

Day Four: Sports Day

Also, day four is for pure fun. First, we go to a wide green valley. And, you can see big gliders fly. Plus, you can fly like a bird too. Next, you run fast and jump off. Then, the strong wind lifts you up. Furthermore, you float in the blue sky. So, you feel very free and light. Therefore, it is a huge great thrill. In addition, you can ride an ATV bike. Truly, the loud bike is quite wild.

Day Five: See The Monks

Next, we shift to a quiet place. First, we will drive to the monk town. Also, the drive takes five long hours. And, the river runs by the road. Plus, the view changes to green tea fields. Next, we will see a grand temple. Then, you can spin the prayer wheels. Moreover, you can hear deep low chants. So, your heart will find still calm. Therefore, sit down and close your eyes. Consequently, you will feel deep rest.

Day Six: Walk The Woods

Then, day six is for a long walk. First, we will go deep in the woods. Also, the tall pine trees block the sun. And, the shade is cool and dark. Plus, we will walk to a bright fall. Next, the cold water drops fast. Furthermore, the loud splash sounds nice. So, we will sit by the pool. Therefore, we can eat a packed lunch. In fact, the fresh air aids health. Thus, the hike is very good for you.

Day Seven: Go Back Home

Finally, the last day is here. First, you will pack your bags tight. Also, you will check out fast. And, we will drive to the stop. Plus, you will say a sad goodbye. Next, you will catch your bus or flight. Then, you will think of the fun days. Moreover, you will look at your photos. So, the joy will stay in your heart. Therefore, you will want to come back. Indeed, we will wait for you again.

Important Travel Tips

  • First, book your trip early.
  • Also, carry a print of your IDs.
  • And, drink bottled safe water.
  • Plus, do not throw trash out.
  • Next, respect the local rules.
  • Then, ask before you take a photo.
  • Moreover, carry an umbrella for rain.
  • So, you stay dry and warm.
  • Therefore, your trip stays fun.
  • Finally, keep a smile on your face.

More Good Facts

First, the local language is sweet. Also, Hindi is spoken by all. And, English works in big towns. Plus, you can ask for help easy. Next, the roads are safe for girls. Furthermore, the crime rate is very low. So, you can walk at late dusk. Therefore, you do not need to fear. In addition, the phone network is fine. Truly, you can call your home fast. Consequently, you stay linked to the world.

Next, let us talk of shopping. First, buy some pure sweet honey. Also, buy fresh local fruit jams. And, the wood crafts are very neat. Plus, the metal rings look grand. Next, you can find cheap wool caps. Then, you can buy warm bright rugs. Moreover, bargain a bit in street shops. So, you can save some extra cash on your budget travel in India. Therefore, shop with a clear smart mind. Indeed, your bags will be very full.

Then, think of health up high. First, the thin air can make you dizzy. Also, walk slow on the first day. And, do not rush up steep stairs. Plus, drink a lot of warm water. Next, eat light foods at first. Furthermore, do not drink strong drinks. So, your head will stay clear. Therefore, you will adjust to the height. In fact, ginger tea helps a lot. Thus, you will stay quite fit.

Extra Places To See

First, let us talk about Kufri. Also, it is near Shimla town. And, you can ride a yak there. Plus, a yak is a big hairy cow. Next, kids love the small zoo. Furthermore, you can see snow leopards. So, it is a fun half day trip. Therefore, add it to your plan. Indeed, the drive is very short. As a result, you do not get tired.

Next, you can visit Mashobra. First, it is very quiet. Also, it has dense thick woods. And, you can see nice old homes. Plus, the bird songs are very loud. Next, you can walk down a dirt road. Then, you can sit and watch clouds. Moreover, the sky turns pink at dusk. So, it is a pure joy to watch. Therefore, artists love this small town. Truly, you will feel at ease.

Then, we look at Narkanda. First, it is higher up the road. Also, it gets a lot of snow. And, folks come here to ski. Plus, the ski slopes are very fine. Next, you can rent nice ski gear. Furthermore, trainers help you learn fast. So, you will glide on the white snow. Therefore, winter fans pick this spot. In fact, the local food is hot and nice. Thus, you stay warm inside.

Also, Chail is a royal place. First, a king built a palace here. And, the palace looks grand and huge. Plus, it has a big green lawn. Next, you can see a high cricket ground. Then, you can walk in the pine shade. Moreover, the peace is very deep here. So, it is far from loud crowds. Therefore, pick Chail for a quiet stay. In addition, the rooms are very large. Consequently, you live like a king.

Next, Mandi is a temple town. First, it sits low by a big river. Also, it has old stone shrines. And, the carved rocks look fine. Plus, they hold a big Shiv fair. Next, folks sing loud local songs. Furthermore, you can see old rich art. So, history fans will like it a lot. Therefore, stop here on your way up. Indeed, it adds a nice cultural touch. Thus, your trip gets deep roots.

Then, we pick the best soft beds. Moreover, we plan your days with care. So, you do not face a tough rush. Therefore, we are your top travel friend. In fact, we work hard for your smile. Conclusion

First, this state is a true gem. Also, it gives peace and high thrills. And, a planned trip works the best. Plus, our plan fits your tight budget. Next, we do all the hard work. Then, you just show up and enjoy. Moreover, our guides are very smart. So, you will not get lost here. Therefore, do not wait or think too much. In addition, grab this prime deal today. Truly, life is short and fast. Consequently, you must travel now.

Conclusion

Himachal Pradesh is a destination that promises something for everyone. Whether you are seeking the thrill of high-altitude passes, the serenity of ancient monasteries, or the simple joy of sipping hot tea while watching the snow fall, this state delivers it all. By carefully selecting from the various Himachal travel packages available, you can ensure a well-organized, stress-free, and magical vacation.

Remember, the mountains are calling. Do your research, align your budget and preferences, and book the perfect package that resonates with your travel dreams. With the right planning, your trip to Himachal Pradesh will undoubtedly be an experience you will cherish for a lifetime.

Frequently Asked Questions ?

Q: How many days are ideal for a Himachal Pradesh trip?
A: A typical trip covering major spots like Shimla and Manali requires at least 6 to 7 days. If you wish to explore Dharamshala, Dalhousie, or the Spiti Valley, you should look for Himachal travel packages that span 10 to 14 days.
Q: 2. Are Himachal travel packages safe for solo female travelers?
A: Yes, Himachal Pradesh is generally considered one of the safest states in India for solo female travelers. The locals are respectful and helpful. However, it is always wise to book reputable Himachal travel packages, avoid isolated areas at night, and keep your family informed about your whereabouts.
Q: Do I need any special permits to visit places in Himachal?
A: For most regular tourist destinations like Shimla, Manali, and Dalhousie, Indian citizens do not need permits. However, visiting the Rohtang Pass requires a permit (usually handled by your tour operator if you book comprehensive Himachal travel packages). Foreign nationals require Inner Line Permits (ILP) to visit protected areas like parts of Spiti and Kinnaur.
Q: Can I experience snow in Himachal during the summer?
A: While the towns of Shimla and Manali do not have snow in the summer, you can often find snow at higher altitudes like the Rohtang Pass (near Manali) or high mountain passes in the Lahaul and Spiti district well into May and June.
Q: Are flights included in standard Himachal travel packages?
A: Most standard Himachal travel packages start from nearby major hubs like Delhi or Chandigarh, providing Volvo bus or private car transfers from there. Flights are typically not included in the base price but can be added as a custom inclusion by your travel agent upon request.
